channel.title: Engineering on Tribhuwan Kandpal
channel.description: Recent content in Engineering on Tribhuwan Kandpal

item.title: Strategic Engineering Leadership: Navigating Ambiguity in Emerging Technologies
item.description: Leading a team through established protocols is an exercise in execution. However, directing professional engineering teams when specifications are fluid requires an entirely different approach to leadership.

item.title: Building at the Speed of Thought: AI as a Force Multiplier
item.description: How I built this blog from ’empty folder’ to ‘production’ in under an hour using AI.
